name: Cheddar Wheat Herb Crescents
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring egg to room temperature.
2. Heat milk to lukewarm.
3. Soften butter.
4. In a large bowl, stir together milk and sugar. Sprinkle yeast over the mixture; let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Add 3 1/2 cups flour, salt, and beaten egg to the yeast mixture. Mix in 3 tbsp butter gradually while stirring in the remaining whole wheat flour until a dough forms.
6. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead for 10 minutes.
7. Place in a greased bowl, cover, let rise until doubled.
8. Make herb butter: In a bowl, combine 1/2 lb softened butter with dried basil, oregano, and lemon juice.
9. Punch down the dough, gradually incorporate grated cheddar cheese.
10. Divide dough into four portions. Roll each portion into a circle; keep covered.
11. Spread herb butter on rolled dough, cut into wedges, roll up, and place on a baking sheet. Cover loosely with plastic wrap.
12. Repeat with remaining dough.
13. Let rise until nearly doubled.
14. Brush with egg wash and sprinkle sesame seeds.
15. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
